rule.instruction: A wall divided into fifteen equal parts, each with a different line direction, and all combinations.

designs.title: gradient L→R, crisp
designs.intent: all 15 combos ordered simple→complex across reading order — a light→dark tonal ramp (Klee #9, #15).

designs.title: gradient cols, gentle
designs.intent: complexity ramps down each column then across — vertical tonal flow (Klee #9).

designs.title: gradient diagonal
designs.intent: density ramps along the diagonal — corner-to-corner tonal sweep (Klee #15).

designs.title: gradient L→R, fine
designs.intent: the tonal ramp at finer spacing — denser, richer (R5/R6 fine preference).

designs.title: scatter A, crisp
designs.intent: combinations scattered — no tonal order, pure enumeration (Klee #11).

designs.title: scatter E, crisp fine
designs.intent: crisp fine scatter — dense crisp enumeration (R5 fine).

designs.title: gradient diagonal fine
designs.intent: diagonal tonal sweep, fine + gentle — predicted sweet spot (R5/R6).
